query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM recebimento_geral; SELECT estabelecimentoId, convenio, COUNT(*) as registros, SUM(CAST(vl_faturado AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_faturado, SUM(CAST(vl_recebido AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_recebido, SUM(CAST(vl_glosas AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_glosas FROM recebimento_geral GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, convenio ORDER BY total_faturado DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM recebimento_geral; SELECT estabelecimentoId, convenio, COUNT(*) as registros, SUM(CAST(vl_faturado AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_faturado, SUM(CAST(vl_recebido AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_recebido, SUM(CAST(vl_glosas AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_glosas FROM recebimento_geral GROUP BY estabelecimentoId, convenio ORDER BY total_faturado DESC LIMIT 10;

rows.total: estabelecimentoId	convenio	registros	total_faturado	total_recebido	total_glosas
